name: Data Table + Filters
intent: A B2B data-list composition for searchable, filterable records with one primary creation action.
structure: Header: title, short context, one primary action
Filter row: search input first, select filters next, secondary actions last
Table: compact density, status badges, owner or timestamp columns
Footer: result count and pagination or next-step action when needed
apply: Keep the toolbar directly above the table so the control relationship is obvious.
Use Button variants for action hierarchy: default for the main action, outline or secondary for supporting actions.
Use Badge only for true row state, priority, or category markers.
Keep layout density compact enough for repeated B2B workflows.
avoid: Do not hand-build a raw table when DataTable fits the record-list use case.
Do not turn the list into a marketing card grid.
Do not introduce custom filter controls before checking the component library.
Do not hardcode colors, spacing, radius, or status palettes.
aiPrompt: Build a Data Table + Filters pattern using only Design-anchor components. Compose Card, Input, Select, Button, Badge, and DataTable. Keep the screen B2B-focused: searchable toolbar above the table, one primary action, compact density, semantic tokens only, and no raw table/input/button controls.
